历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 93,045 → 80,183 → 77,623 → 80,014 → 124,910. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 77,000–93,000 range, but in 2025 they plummeted to 124,910, a drop of about 45,000 compared to 2024, a significant decline possibly related to adjustments in major group structure and changes in candidates' application psychology. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong has been continuously increasing: 59 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 83 in 2025, and a substantial expansion to 111 in 2026, an increase of 28 (+33.7%) from 2025. This large expansion theoretically pushes up the admission ranking numbers (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2025 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 198th, and in 2026 it did not enter the top 200, placing it in the mid-to-lower segment of 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University had no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating overall weak disciplinary competitiveness and limited attraction for high-scoring candidates in terms of majors. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 106th, rated as 'average', with 13 sample videos and a comprehensive popularity of about 49,565, indicating low short-video exposure. In the university reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, no public opinion incidents related to Qinghai University appeared, suggesting no major positive or negative舆论 shocks in recent years, and relatively stable application psychology expectations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are socially rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended'. Qinghai University enrolls students in these fields, which has some appeal to mid-score candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 436 in 2025, stable in the 432–445 range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Guangdong Province, so cross-province study preferences are relatively low, somewhat suppressing application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong has increased in recent years (83 in Physics Category in 2025), but overall it remains a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal sharp drop in rankings in 2025, the large 33.7% expansion in enrollment plan for 2026, the 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, and the generally average university level and reputation. Given that the 2025 ranking crash may include one-time adjustment factors, and the 2026 expansion increases candidates' choice space, the ranking may slightly rebound. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 149,192, with a range of 148,692–149,692.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Qinghai University's medical category in Guangdong Province had a minimum admission ranking of 93045 in 2021 (plan 7), 78931 in 2022 (plan 6), 76459 in 2023 (plan 7), 70073 in 2024 (plan 7), and 124910 in 2025 (plan 12). Rankings consistently moved forward from 2021 to 2024, reflecting increasing competition for medical majors in Guangdong. In 2025, due to a significant expansion of the enrollment plan from 7 to 12 (71% increase), the admission ranking notably shifted back to 124910. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 11 (approximately 8.3% reduction), which has a slight forward-pushing effect on rankings, but the impact is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national '211 Project' key construction university and a 'Double First-Class' construction university, located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. It is a comprehensive key university in the northwestern region. Although situated in the west, its 211 and Double First-Class statuses have high recognition nationwide. Medical disciplines are its traditional strengths, with clinical medicine and other majors having a long history.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors in Guangdong Province continue to maintain high application enthusiasm, with core majors like clinical medicine and stomatology being highly competitive. Qinghai University's location in the northwest has relatively weaker regional appeal compared to coastal universities, but its 211/Double First-Class brand still has strong attraction for out-of-province students. In 2026, among medical majors, clinical medicine plans increase to 4, pharmacy to 2, and acupuncture and tuina is newly added, with overall enrollment scale slightly contracting.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in 2026 is approximately 120665, with a fluctuation range of 120165 to 121165. Compared to the 2025 ranking, there is a slight forward movement, mainly due to the small reduction in enrollment plan, but the inertia of the ranking shift caused by the significant expansion in 2025 remains, so the ranking in 2026 is not expected to recover substantially.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Clinical medicine and stomatology are the most competitive, requiring a ranking significantly above the predicted range for a higher chance; pharmacy, preventive medicine, and traditional Chinese medicine are of medium difficulty; acupuncture and tuina, as a newly added major, is expected to have a relatively lower admission threshold.
